verses.text: Moses in biakbuk dingsakin, tua biakbuk leh a nazatte khempeuh sathau nuhin ap a, biakna tau leh a nazatte khempeuh sathau nuhin a ap a man ni-in
Israel makaite, a beh ukpite, minam makaite ahi a kisim mite a ukte in
buk a nei leeng guk leh bawngtal sawmlenih Topa' mai-ah paipih uh a, leeng khatah makai nih, mi khatah bawngtal khat ciatin sehin a biakna uh pia uh hi. Amaute in biakbuk mai-ah tuate pia uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses kiangah
“Kikhopna buk nasepna-ah zat dingin amau' tung panin tuate sang in la, a nasep ciat uh tawh kizui-in Levi mite pia in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moses in leengte leh bawngtalte saang-in Levi mite a pia hi
Amau' nasep tawh kizui-in Gershon mite tungah leeng nih leh bawngtal li pia hi
Siampi Aaron' tapa Ithamar' ukna nuai-ah na a sem Merari mite tungah amau' nasep tawh kizui-in leeng li leh bawngtal giat pia hi
Ahih hangin Kohath mite tungah bangmah pialo hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh liangko-ah a puak ding uh a siangtho nate kep ding amaute tavuan kipia hi
Biakna tau sathau a kinuh ni-in a apna dingin makaite in a biakna uh biakna tau mai-ah pia uh hi
Topa in Moses kiangah, “Biakna tau apna dingin makai khat in ni khat ciat a biakna uh pia ding uh hi,” a ci hi
A ni masa ni-a biakna a piapa pen Judah minam, Amminadab' tapa Nahshon ahi hi
Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za leh sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biakna dingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh
shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh
meihal biakna dingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat
khialhna hanga biakna dingin keel a pa khat
leh thunuama biakpiakna dingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, leh kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Amminadab' tapa Nahshon' piak ahi hi
A ni nih ni-in Issakhar mite a makai, Zuar' tapa Nethanel in biakna pia hi

A biakna dingin amah in biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za leh sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biakna dingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh
shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh

khialhna hanga biakna dingin keel a pa khat
leh thunuama biakpiakna dingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, leh kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Zuar' tapa Nethanel' piak ahi hi
A ni thum ni-in Zebulun mite a makai, Helon' tapa Eliab ahi hi

A ni sawm ni-in Dan mite a makai, Ammishaddai' tapa Ahiezer ahi hi

A ni sawmlekhat ni-in Asher mite a makai, Okran' tapa Pagiel ahi hi
Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za leh sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biakna dingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh

A ni sawmlenih ni-in Naftali mite a makai, Enan' tapa Ahira ahi hi
Ama piakte pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel za leh sawmthum a gik ngun kuangdai khat, shekel sawmsagih a gik ngun kuang khat, an tawh biakna dingin sathau tawh a kibawl annel a dim tuak tawh
shekel sawm a gik kham pakan khat, paknamtui a dim tawh
meihal biakna dingin bawngtalno khat, tuutal khat, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa khat
khialhna hanga biakna dingin keel a pa khat
leh thunuama biakpiakna dingin bawngtal nih, tuutal nga, keel a pa nga, leh kum khat a pha tuuno a pa nga ahi hi. Hihte pen Enan' tapa Ahira' piak ahi hi
Biakna tau sathau a kinuh ni-in a piakte: Ngun kuangdai sawmlenih, ngun kuang sawmlenih
ngun kuangdai khat ciangin shekel za leh sawmthum gikin ngun kuang khat ciangin shekel sawmsagih gik a, ngun kuangte khempeuh pen biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in shekel tul nih leh za li gik hi
Paknamtui tawh a kidim kham pakan sawmlenihte, biakinn shekel tawh kizui-in khat ciangin shekel sawm gik a, kham pakan khempeuh pen shekel za leh sawmnih gik hi
Meihal biakna dingin ganhing khempeuh pen bawngtal sawmlenih, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawmlenih, an-a a biaknate tawh; leh khialhna hanga biakna-in keel a pa sawmlenih

leh thunuama biakpiakna-in ganhing khempeuh bawngtal sawmnihleli, tuutal sawmguk, keel a pa sawmguk, kum khat a pha tuuno a pa sawmguk ahi hi. Hihte pen biakna tau sathau a kinuh khit ciangin apna biakna ahi hi

Topa tawh a kiho dingin kikhopna buk sungah Moses a pai ciangin, kherub nihte' kikal, thuciamna singkuang tungah a om hehpihna tokhom tung san teng panin amah a hopih awging khat om a, tua awging in Moses a hopih hi.
